text:

> |> wrote:
> |> | On 3 Mar 2014, at 13:21, Mathieu Arnold wrote:
> |> |> Also, the DEPENDS target were sorted, I'll let you get the sort
> |> order ;-)
> |> |
> |> | Yes, in a fit of OCD. The order there doesn't affect anything,
> |> right?
> |>
> |> Nope, but I liked it better the way it was :-)
> |
> | Haha, why?! It's not even in chronological order!
> |
>
> Ah, yes, the FETCH is way to late.

And PKG is at the beginning.
